reviews.author: Google Customer
reviews.text: Fixed my problem, worked clean and technician was prompt, friendly and professional. I refer them to friends and neighbors. Fair pricing for quality work.

reviews.author: Google Customer
reviews.text: They are a reliable honest company that does what they say they're going to do, shows up when they say they will, and does it for a fair price.

reviews.author: Google Customer
reviews.text: Arrived on time and because of their efficient work, completed the projects in just a few hours. Additionally they completely cleaned up any debris that had been created.

reviews.author: Google Customer
reviews.text: Glass Electric was prompt, professional, friendly, and knowledgeable.

reviews.author: Long-time customer
reviews.text: I have used them for more than 8 years and am extremely happy with the level of service and fairness of price.

reviews.author: Repeat customer
reviews.text: They always do great work, are neat in their work, clean up after themselves, show up when expected, and their prices are much better than other local electrician companies.

reviews.author: Featured GBP reviewer
reviews.text: Knowledgeable, reliable, honest, hard working group of some of the nicest folks.

counts.aggregate_rating_source: Google live page; BBB A+ (unaccredited, file 2006)

notes: Third-generation family business since 1970 (56 years). Founded by Jack C. Glass; now run by grandsons Jimmy and Kerry Glass (James A. Glass listed as President on BBB). Residential + commercial. Fulton County + metro Atlanta.

capture_attempts.reason: rating+count visible, individual review names not surfaced
